title: psacalium holwayanum
intro: Psacalium holwayanum, also known as Tree Marigold, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family. The plant is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Psacalium holwayanum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
